prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait only as the identity reference. Preserve the person’s real facial features, face shape, skin tone, eye shape, and recognizable hairstyle. Do not copy the original clothing, background, lighting, pose, or image quality from the uploaded portrait. Create a vertical close-up semi-realistic cyber streetwear portrait of the person, slightly turned toward the camera with a calm confident gaze. The person wears a clean black face mask, a black streetwear cap with no logo or readable text, metallic headphones resting around the neck, and stylish accessories such as a silver pendant necklace and a modern wristwatch. Choose a fashionable techwear-inspired outfit that best suits the person’s appearance and hairstyle, not the same as any reference outfit. Use dramatic neon blue and soft pink lighting, glossy highlights, cinematic rim light on the hair, dreamy gradient background, subtle lens glow, soft atmospheric particles, high-detail skin texture, expressive eyes, natural body proportions, elegant shoulder and upper-body composition. The image should feel like a polished AI fashion illustration mixed with realistic portrait photography, high-end cyber street style, clean composition, sharp facial details, no watermark, no logo, no text.

Negative Prompt：watermark, logo, text, signature, readable letters, brand name, copied clothing, low quality, blurry face, distorted eyes, deformed hands, extra fingers, bad anatomy, plastic skin, over-smoothed face, cartoonish face, anime style, doll-like skin, messy composition, harsh artifacts, duplicated accessories, unrealistic body proportions
